sampling_method: LLM-adjusted route-cluster weights. Target routes sample from llm_route_cluster_weight; other routes sample from truck_appearance_frequency * llm_route_cluster_weight.

target_vehicle.llm_rationale: Lowest distance mean (37.6 km); appropriate for 155's low-intensity profile but underrepresented. Increase slightly to balance route diversity.

other_vehicle.llm_rationale: 8 days with lower distance (94.1 km mean, tight 29.7–210.9 km). Frequent short-range; increase from 0.258 to 0.24.

target_vehicle.llm_rationale: Stable, consistent distances (38.2 km mean, tight range 30.7–48.1 km). Largest sample (8 days) with narrow variance. Increase to primary weight for reliable scenario generation.

other_vehicle.llm_rationale: 5 days with high distance (140.8 km mean, tight 67.7–243.8 km). Secondary; reduce from 0.161 to 0.17.

target_vehicle.llm_rationale: Smallest sample (3 days), lowest distance (34.3 km mean). Rare variant; minimal weight to reflect infrequent occurrence.

other_vehicle.llm_rationale: 5 days with high distance (184.1 km mean). Secondary; maintain 0.15.

target_vehicle.llm_rationale: Moderate distance (47.5 km mean) with 8 days observed. Similar to cluster 1 but tighter distribution. Allocate secondary weight.

other_vehicle.llm_rationale: 5 days with very high distance (306.1 km mean, tight 243.4–358.1 km). Consistent extreme; reduce from 0.161 to 0.17.

target_vehicle.llm_rationale: Moderate distance (48.1 km mean) with highest sample count (7 days). Well-represented; maintain elevated weight to reflect frequent behavior.

other_vehicle.llm_rationale: 6 days with moderate-high distance (155.3 km median 177.1 km). Variant behavior; reduce from 0.194 to 0.20 for rebalance.
